name: Umanitek Agent Guardian
description: Detects escalation, dependency, and prompt-injection threats from tool calls and prompts, and reports sightings to the local DKG threat graph. Audit-only by default; blocking is opt-in.

hooks.notes: before_agent_run is a conversation hook: OpenClaw requires plugins.entries.guardian.hooks.allowConversationAccess=true for it to receive the prompt and session messages. Without it, tool-call, message, and session detection still work, but the prompt-injection scan on the incoming run is skipped.

mode.description: audit = observe + report only; block = also block tool calls and runs at or above blockSeverity.

contextGraphId.description: Public curated threat context-graph id on the local DKG node.

dkgUrl.description: Local DKG node HTTP URL (override with $DKG_DAEMON_URL).

syncInterval.description: Seconds between ruleset refreshes from the node.

report.description: Share sightings to shared working memory (SWM) when a threat matches.

dailyReportLimit.description: Anti-bot cap on outbound sighting reports per day.

blockSeverity.description: Minimum severity blocked when mode is block.
